## Matriks Densitas Tereduksi {auto-animate=true auto-animate-easing="ease-in-out"}

::: {.r-stack}
::: {data-id="box3" style="background: #e83e8c; color: white; width: 380px; height: 380px; border-radius: 200px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);"}
<div style="font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold; opacity: 0.8; letter-spacing: 1px;">SISTEM TOTAL</div>
<div style="font-size: 24px; margin-top: 5px;">$$\rho = |\psi_{k}(\alpha_i,\alpha_j) \rangle_{x} \langle \psi_{k}(\alpha_i,\alpha_j) |_{x}$$</div>
:::
:::



## Matriks Densitas Tereduksi {auto-animate=true auto-animate-easing="ease-in-out"}

::: {.r-stack}
::: {data-id="box1" style="background: #2780e3; color: white; width: 380px; height: 380px; border-radius: 200px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start; padding-top: 25px; box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);"}
<div style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; opacity: 0.8; letter-spacing: 1px;">SISTEM 3</div>
<div style="font-size: 15px; margin-top: 2px;">$$\rho_3=\operatorname{Tr}_{12}(\rho)$$</div>
:::

::: {data-id="box2" style="background: #3fb618; color: white; width: 260px; height: 260px; border-radius: 200px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start; padding-top: 20px; box-shadow: 0 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);"}
<div style="font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; opacity: 0.8; letter-spacing: 1px;">SISTEM 2</div>
<div style="font-size: 16px; margin-top: 5px;">$$\rho_2=\operatorname{Tr}_{13}(\rho)$$</div>
:::

::: {data-id="box3" style="background: #e83e8c; color: white; width: 140px; height: 140px; border-radius: 200px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);"}
<div style="font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; opacity: 0.8; letter-spacing: 1px;">SISTEM 1</div>
<div style="font-size: 18px; margin-top: 5px;">$$\rho_1=\operatorname{Tr}_{23}(\rho)$$</div>
:::
:::



## Matriks Densitas Tereduksi {auto-animate=true auto-animate-easing="ease-in-out"}

::: {.r-hstack}
::: {data-id="box1" style="background: #2780e3; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Sistem 1</div>
$$\rho_1=\operatorname{Tr}_{23}(\rho)$$
:::

::: {data-id="box2" style="background: #3fb618; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Sistem 2</div>
$$\rho_2=\operatorname{Tr}_{13}(\rho)$$
:::

::: {data-id="box3" style="background: #e83e8c; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Sistem 3</div>
$$\rho_3=\operatorname{Tr}_{12}(\rho)$$
:::
:::



## Matriks Densitas Tereduksi {auto-animate=true auto-animate-easing="ease-in-out"}

::: {.r-hstack}
::: {data-id="box1" style="background: #2780e3; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Sistem 1</div>
$$\rho_1=\operatorname{Tr}_{23}(\rho)$$
:::

::: {data-id="box2" style="background: #3fb618; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Sistem 2</div>
$$\rho_2=\operatorname{Tr}_{13}(\rho)$$
:::

::: {data-id="box3" style="background: #e83e8c; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Sistem 3</div>
$$\rho_3=\operatorname{Tr}_{12}(\rho)$$
:::
:::

::: {.r-hstack .fragment}
<div style="width: 260px; margin: 0 10px; text-align: center; font-size: 28px; color: #666;">$$\downarrow$$</div>
<div style="width: 260px; margin: 0 10px; text-align: center; font-size: 28px; color: #666;">$$\downarrow$$</div>
<div style="width: 260px; margin: 0 10px; text-align: center; font-size: 28px; color: #666;">$$\downarrow$$</div>
:::

::: {.r-hstack}
::: {data-id="eigen1" style="background: #2780e3; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Nilai Eigen $\rho_1$</div>
$$\lambda_i^{(1)}$$
:::

::: {data-id="eigen2" style="background: #3fb618; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Nilai Eigen $\rho_2$</div>
$$\lambda_j^{(2)}$$
:::

::: {data-id="eigen3" style="background: #e83e8c; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Nilai Eigen $\rho_3$</div>
$$\lambda_k^{(3)}$$
:::
:::



## Matriks Densitas Tereduksi {auto-animate=true auto-animate-easing="ease-in-out"}

::: {.r-hstack}
::: {data-id="box1" style="background: #2780e3; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Sistem 1</div>
$$\rho_1=\operatorname{Tr}_{23}(\rho)$$
:::

::: {data-id="box2" style="background: #3fb618; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Sistem 2</div>
$$\rho_2=\operatorname{Tr}_{13}(\rho)$$
:::

::: {data-id="box3" style="background: #e83e8c; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Sistem 3</div>
$$\rho_3=\operatorname{Tr}_{12}(\rho)$$
:::
:::

::: {.r-hstack}
<div style="width: 260px; margin: 0 10px; text-align: center; font-size: 28px; color: #666;">$$\downarrow$$</div>
<div style="width: 260px; margin: 0 10px; text-align: center; font-size: 28px; color: #666;">$$\downarrow$$</div>
<div style="width: 260px; margin: 0 10px; text-align: center; font-size: 28px; color: #666;">$$\downarrow$$</div>
:::

::: {.r-hstack}
::: {data-id="eigen1" style="background: #2780e3; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Nilai Eigen $\rho_1$</div>
$$\lambda_i^{(1)}$$
:::

::: {data-id="eigen2" style="background: #3fb618; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Nilai Eigen $\rho_2$</div>
$$\lambda_j^{(2)}$$
:::

::: {data-id="eigen3" style="background: #e83e8c; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Nilai Eigen $\rho_3$</div>
$$\lambda_k^{(3)}$$
:::
:::

::: {.r-hstack .fragment}
<div style="width: 260px; margin: 0 10px; text-align: center; font-size: 28px; color: #666;">$$\downarrow$$</div>
<div style="width: 260px; margin: 0 10px; text-align: center; font-size: 28px; color: #666;">$$\downarrow$$</div>
<div style="width: 260px; margin: 0 10px; text-align: center; font-size: 28px; color: #666;">$$\downarrow$$</div>
:::

::: {.r-hstack}
::: {data-id="entropy1" style="background: #2780e3; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Entropi $S_1$</div>
<div style="font-size: 18px; width: 100%; text-align: center;">
$$S_1 =-\sum \lambda_i^{(1)} \log_2 \lambda_i^{(1)}$$
</div>
:::

::: {data-id="entropy2" style="background: #3fb618; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Entropi $S_2$</div>
<div style="font-size: 18px; width: 100%; text-align: center;">
$$S_2 = -\sum \lambda_j^{(2)} \log_2 \lambda_j^{(2)}$$
</div>
:::

::: {data-id="entropy3" style="background: #e83e8c; color: white; width: 260px; height: 140px; margin: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);"}
<div style="font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px; opacity: 0.9;">Entropi $S_3$</div>
<div style="font-size: 18px; width: 100%; text-align: center;">
$$S_3 = -\sum \lambda_k^{(3)} \log_2 \lambda_k^{(3)}$$
</div>
:::
:::
